summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a high‑energy show highlighted by a smoking Half‑Step > Franklin’s and an off‑the‑charts Eyes of the World.
review: The performance is described as top‑shelf throughout, with Jerry delivering precise, upbeat solos, Mickey and Bill laying down an Ollin Arageed drum beat that segues into a killer Drums > Not Fade Away jam, and a standout Half‑Step > Franklin’s. The soundboard source is praised as almost perfect, making the recording crisp and highly listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews are very positive (three 5‑star, one 4‑star). Reviewers repeatedly call out superb playing and an almost perfect soundboard recording, indicating a high‑quality show and excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers note the sound is crisp, boss, and an "almost perfect sounding board"; one reviewer gave the sound a 4/5 rating.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set flows with high energy, tight transitions (notably Drums > Not Fade Away into the jam), and consistently strong playing throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Super up‑beat and precise soloing; his guitar work is described as "off the charts".
band_member_comments.Drums: Mickey and Bill deliver an Ollin Arageed hand‑drum beat and a stellar Drums > Not Fade Away segment.
